ques: Locate the ArXiv Help section and find instructions on how to subscribe to daily listing emails for new submissions in a specific category.
answer: In the ArXiv Help section (info.arxiv.org/help → "Subscribe to E-Mail Listings"), the page "Subscribe to daily listing emails" explains: send a plain-ASCII-text email to the archive's address `<archive>@arxiv.org` with `Subject: subscribe <Your Name>`. For archives with subject classes, list categories in the body (e.g. To: q-fin@arxiv.org, Subject: subscribe John Smith, body: "add RM"); for undivided archives just the subscribe subject line suffices; astro-ph/cond-mat/nlin subsets go through physics@arxiv.org. Cancel by emailing the archive with Subject: cancel.
